description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage and a cache of the .m2/ directory. Add a WetSponge job that uses the gradle Docker image, runs only on tag pipelines, executes the commands 'gradle build' then 'sh deploy.sh', and publishes any generated .jar files as an artifact named ${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}. Add a pages job that uses the webdevops/sphinx Docker image, runs only on the master branch, runs 'cd docs', 'make html', 'cd ..', 'cp -rl docs/_build/html public/', and 'ls public', and stores the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
